allow: PowerShell(wsl bash -c "cat ~/frappe-bench/apps/scout/scout/api/company/jobs_applications.py | python3 -c 'import sys; lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\); print\(\\"\\".join\(lines[:60]\)\)'")

Bash(wsl -e bash -lc 'which pip3 2>/dev/null || echo "no pip3"; which mariadb 2>/dev/null || echo "no mariadb"; which redis-server 2>/dev/null || echo "no redis"; which node 2>/dev/null || echo "no node"; which bench 2>/dev/null || echo "no bench"; ls ~/frappe-bench 2>/dev/null || echo "no frappe-bench"; cat ~/scout-setup.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo "no log"')

Bash(wsl -u root -e bash -lc 'mysql -uroot -e "SELECT user, host, plugin FROM mysql.user WHERE user='"'"'root'"'"';" 2>&1')
